title: ranunculus baudotii f. pedicellatus
intro: Ranunculus baudotii f. pedicellatus, also known as the yellow water buttercup or golden buttercup, is a plant species in the Ranunculaceae family. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including alkaloids and glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. It is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The herbal preparation of Ranunculus baudotii f. pedicellatus is typically made into a tincture or infusion, and can be used to treat conditions such as skin irritations and minor infections.
